remember: Students will be able to recall the definitions of various types of polymers.
Students will be able to list the characteristics of natural and synthetic polymers.
Students will be able to identify the applications of various polymers.
understand: Students will be able to explain the types of polymerization reactions.
Students will be able to describe the structure and properties of polymers.
Students will be able to describe the uses of polymers in everyday life.
apply: Students will be able to apply the properties of polymers to design new materials.
Students will be able to use the knowledge of polymerization reactions to synthesize new polymers.
Students will be able to evaluate the suitability of various polymers for different applications.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the advantages and disadvantages of natural and synthetic polymers.
Students will be able to compare the properties and applications of different polymers.
Students will be able to evaluate the impact of polymers on the environment and human health.

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT objective 1: To describe the types of polymers and their properties.
To explain the structure and properties of polymers.
To describe the uses of polymers in everyday life.
board_exam_objectives: To identify the types of polymerization reactions.
To describe the properties and applications of various polymers.
To evaluate the importance of polymers in our daily life.
